fullArticle:
Wrestling Observer Radio with Bryan Alvarez and Dave Meltzer is back with tons to talk about including Kenny Omega’s title win, the full Dynamite recap and what Wembley is looking like, tons of thoughts on the TNA Dark Side of the Ring, Conor McGregor, Sheamus, Tiger Mask, ratings, more notes from the shareholder lawsuit, and more! A packed show so check it out~!
